consumes.artifact: evals/results/ (trial outputs read at render time)

produces.artifact: skills/arc-evaluating/dashboard/server.js (or equivalent entry point after migration)
skills/arc-evaluating/dashboard/ui.html with 2-tab layout, feedback textboxes, keyboard nav

requirement.title: Two-Tab Layout: Outputs and Benchmark
requirement.description: The dashboard UI MUST present two top-level tabs: "Outputs" and "Benchmark". Outputs shows one trial at a time with its prompt, the agent's output files rendered inline, grading results, and (when present) a previous-iteration side-by-side diff. Benchmark shows aggregate stats: pass rate (mean ± stddev), delta, CI, token and duration deltas, and per-assertion breakdown. Tab state MUST persist via URL fragment so a user can link a specific tab / trial.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given the dashboard is open on a completed run, clicking the Outputs tab MUST render one trial and clicking Benchmark MUST render aggregate stats without a page reload. fr-dash-001
The active tab and active trial ID MUST be encoded in the URL (e.g., #tab=outputs&trial=3) so copy-pasted URLs open the same view. fr-dash-001
The Benchmark tab MUST display token and duration deltas alongside pass-rate delta (consuming the data surfaced per fr-gr-002). fr-dash-001

requirement.title: Auto-Saving Feedback Textbox per Eval
requirement.description: The Outputs tab MUST include a textbox where the human reviewer can type free-form feedback on the displayed trial. Changes MUST be auto-saved to evals/results/<scenario>/<runId>/feedback.json within 2 seconds of typing stopping. Reloading the page MUST restore the prior feedback. A visible status indicator (e.g., "Saved" / "Saving…") SHOULD surface the auto-save state.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given the user types in the feedback textbox and pauses for 2 seconds, the content MUST be written to feedback.json at the canonical location keyed by trial id. fr-dash-002
Given a trial has prior feedback in feedback.json, navigating to that trial MUST pre-populate the textbox with the stored content. fr-dash-002

The UI MUST surface save state so the user is not left guessing whether their input persisted. Minimum: a textual indicator that transitions between "Saving…" and "Saved" within the save window. fr-dash-002

requirement.title: Keyboard Navigation Between Trials
requirement.description: While the Outputs tab is active, pressing ArrowRight MUST advance to the next trial and ArrowLeft MUST go to the previous. The keystrokes MUST NOT consume focus when the user is typing in the feedback textbox. Tab order MUST remain usable for screen readers; keyboard shortcuts are additive, not exclusive.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given the Outputs tab is active and the cursor is outside any input, a single ArrowRight press MUST render the next trial in sequence. fr-dash-003
Given the cursor is inside the feedback textbox, ArrowLeft / ArrowRight MUST move the cursor within the text, NOT navigate trials. fr-dash-003
At the first or last trial respectively, ArrowLeft / ArrowRight MUST be a no-op (no wrap-around, no error). fr-dash-003

requirement.title: Retain SSE Real-Time Monitoring
requirement.description: The SSE channel from the current dashboard MUST be preserved in the consolidated UI. While an eval run is in progress, in-flight trial progress MUST appear on the Outputs tab without a page reload. The real-time capability differentiates arcforge's dashboard from skill-creator's static viewer and MUST NOT be lost in the consolidation.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given an arc eval ab run is in progress, the dashboard MUST display newly completed trials within 5 seconds of their completion, without a user action. fr-dash-004
The SSE endpoint (/events or equivalent) MUST remain at a stable URL path after the file relocation, so any external tooling that polled the prior dashboard continues to work. fr-dash-004
Given a client disconnects, the server MUST clean up the SSE subscription and continue serving other connected clients without leaking memory. fr-dash-004
